title: Brevo vs Campaign Monitor (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Brevo and Campaign Monitor. Brevo offers all-in-one CRM with free tier; Campaign Monitor excels at multi-brand management for agencies.
h1: Brevo vs Campaign Monitor: Detailed Comparison
intro: Brevo and Campaign Monitor are both established email marketing platforms, but they serve different needs. Brevo positions itself as an all-in-one CRM suite with multi-channel capabilities, while Campaign Monitor specializes in beautiful email design and multi-brand management for agencies. Your choice depends on whether you need a comprehensive platform with a free tier or a premium solution optimized for professional email teams.

comparison_table.tool_a: Email, SMS, WhatsApp, Live Chat, CRM

choose_a_if: You want a free tier with up to 100,000 subscribers
You need multi-channel marketing beyond email (SMS, WhatsApp, live chat)
You require both transactional email API and campaign marketing in one platform
choose_b_if: You're an agency managing multiple client brands
You prioritize beautiful email templates and design tools
You prefer a dedicated, focused email platform without additional channels

faq.q: Is Brevo better than Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: It depends on your needs. Brevo is better for startups and businesses needing a free tier and multi-channel capabilities, offering superior overall value. Campaign Monitor is better for professional agencies that need advanced multi-brand management and premium template design without worrying about cost.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Brevo or Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Brevo is significantly cheaper, with a free tier supporting up to 100,000 subscribers and paid plans starting at $25/month. Campaign Monitor has no free tier and starts at $11/month, making it more expensive from the first paid plan onward.

faq.q: Can I switch from Campaign Monitor to Brevo?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms typically allow you to export your contact lists and migrate campaigns. However, you'll need to manually recreate your automation workflows and templates in Brevo. Most email marketing platforms offer CSV export, making the migration process relatively straightforward.
